ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package's repository */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer's name or contact information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of imports from the parent package to the child package */,
  "method_count" INTEGER /* Number of methods imported from the parent package to the child package */,
  "class_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes imported from the parent package to the child package */,
  "heaviness" INTEGER /* Heaviness of the dependency (a measure of how dependent the child package is on the parent package) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is required for the package to function */,
  "import_path" TEXT /* Path of the import (e.g., file or module path) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., function, method, class) */,
  "import_name" TEXT /* Name of the import */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the import */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the import was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the import was last updated */,
  "import_path" TEXT /* Path of the import */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the import is required for the package to function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_imports_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable */,
  "dependencies_version" TEXT /* Version of dependencies used in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, build engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_users_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES package_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_records" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number of the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "build_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the build */,
  "build_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the build */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Build log for the build */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build record was last updated */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Build environment (e.g., OS, hardware) */,
  "build_trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the build (e.g., manual, CI/CD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_records_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_dependencies" (
  "build_dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build dependency */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the build dependency was last updated */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency used in the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_dependencies_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_dependencies_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES package_build_records ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., syntax, runtime) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_stacktrace" TEXT /* Error stacktrace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the error was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the error was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the error occurred */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_errors_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES package_build_records ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., deprecation, performance) */,
  "warning_message" TEXT /* Warning message */,
  "warning_stacktrace" TEXT /* Warning stacktrace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warning was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warning was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the warning occurred */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the warning occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_warnings_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES package_build_records ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "artifact_name" TEXT /* Name of the artifact */,
  "artifact_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact (e.g., library, executable) */,
  "artifact_path" TEXT /* File path to the artifact */,
  "artifact_size" REAL /* Size of the artifact in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the artifact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the artifact was last updated */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the artifact for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_artifacts_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES package_build_records ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_build_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., build time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, MB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., build tool, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_build_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES package_build_records ("build_id")
)
